results.rendered_html: aniśa (von 3. a + niś oder niśā Nacht) adj. (ohne Nacht) ununterbrochen, beständig  H. 1471 . Davon aniśam adv. gaṇa svarādi;  AK. 1,1,1,61 .  H. 1531 . 1471 , Sch.  R. 4,5,24 . 5,81,50 .  ŚĀK. 65 . 54 , v. l.  AMAR. 70 .

results.rendered_html:
aniśa a. Ved.
1 Nightless, i. e. uninterrupted, incessant (niśā taddhetukatvenopacārāt ceṣṭavināśaḥ sā nāsti yasya).
2 Ever afraid.
— śaṃ ind. Incessantly, ceaselessly; aniśamapi makaraketurmanaso rujamāvahannabhimato me  Ś. 3. 4 ;  Bv. 2. 162.
